32261.original: A popular initiative aims to reduce television and radio fees (CHF 200 per household, exemption for businesses). Do you support this initiative?
easy_paraphrase: Do you back the proposal of a popular initiative to lower the television and radio fees to CHF 200 per household, while exempting businesses?
Are you in favor of the popular initiative that proposes cutting radio and television fees to CHF 200 per household, with businesses being exempt?

Would you support the popular initiative aiming to lower radio and television fees to CHF 200 per household, with businesses not required to pay?

32228.original: Should the conditions for naturalization be relaxed (e.g., shorter residence period)?

32222.original: Should insured persons contribute more to health care costs (e.g., increase the minimum deductible)?
